summary: Completed comprehensive testing of German medical onboarding app iteration 11 - Condition presets in admin step editor and user progress history timeline feature

minor_issues.issue: Admin endpoints return 403 when using Bearer token authentication in backend tests
minor_issues.impact: Backend API tests for admin functions couldn't be completed via automated scripts
minor_issues.workaround: Admin functionality works correctly via frontend interface using cookie-based authentication

passed_tests: Demo user authentication and dashboard access
CRITICAL: Admin step editor shows all 7 section tabs (Grunddaten, Typ-Einstellungen, Felder, Anforderungen, Mappings, Bedingungen, Benachrichtigungen)
CRITICAL: Admin step editor Conditions section shows 'Vorlagen' (Presets) box with 6 clickable preset buttons
CRITICAL: All 6 condition preset buttons found: Vorheriger Schritt abgeschlossen, Dokument vorhanden, Dokument fehlt → blockieren, Feld ausgefüllt, Bestimmtes Fachgebiet, Weiterleitung zu Schritt
CRITICAL: Clicking preset buttons adds pre-configured conditions to the list
CRITICAL: User dashboard header shows clock icon (timeline toggle)
CRITICAL: Clicking clock icon reveals 'Verlauf' (History) panel with timeline entries
CRITICAL: Timeline shows step name, German status badges (In Bearbeitung/Abgeschlossen), step number, and German timestamp format
CRITICAL: API GET /api/steps/history returns progress history entries with step_title, action, timestamp, step_order
CRITICAL: Saving progress creates history entries (verified 2→3 entries after progress update)
CRITICAL: Timeline entries show proper German formatting with timestamps like '14.04.2026, 13:48'
API GET /api/steps/all-data returns comprehensive step data for conditional logic
Progress history creation working correctly - backend stores entries in progress_history collection
User timeline shows colored status indicators and German localization
Step progression and navigation working correctly
German localization working properly throughout the application
Backend API core functionality (authentication, step data retrieval, progress updates)

success_percentage.backend: 88.9% (8/9 tests passed - admin API access issue via scripts)
